records.pInfo:
Restore HP equal to 30% of the damage taken
from physical attacks. However, damage
resulting in KO will not be healed.

Restore MP equal to 1% of the damage
sustained. This effect is not triggered by
damage from poison.

Has a 60% chance to counterattack, when taking
a single-target physical attack, and deal the
same damage as a conventional attack.

When equipping a weapon in each hand,
normally only 50% of the weapons’ physical
attack is applied to the character’s physical
attack. This support ability allows 100% to
be applied.

If an ally with less than 20% of HP left takes a
single-target attack, you will take the attack
instead.

Has a 50% chance to apply slow to your
attacker when taking a single-target physical
attack.
Raise magic attack by 10%.
Lower the MP cost of time magic by 25%.
Confer immunity to stop during battles.

Return to the start of a battle if the entire party
is wiped out. Note that even if multiple
characters have this support ability, the effect
only occurs once per battle.

Lower the BP of all allies and enemies by one
once every two turns. This works even if the
character with this support ability is KO’d.
Raise magic attack by 30%.

Raise the BP of all allies and enemies by 1 at
the end of each turn. This works even if the
character with this support ability is KO’d.

Has a 50% chance to counterattack with fire
damage when hit with a single-target physical
attack.

Imbue a weapon with an MP absorb effect for
ten turns, starting from the beginning of the
battle. Attacks with this weapon absorb the
target’s MP. Note that this can be overwritten by
other sword magic.

When using elemental sword magic, damage
from the element in use is reduced for four
turns.

Restore 50% of MP for all allies except yourself
when you suffer a KO. KO’d allies, however, do
not recover MP.

In the absence of a limit-breaking effect, the
upper limit for MP restoration is 999.

Raise magic defense by 50% for four turns
when hit by a magic attack.

*The upper limit for magic defense is 150%.

Lower physical defense by 25% and raise
magic defense by 50%.

The MP cost of sword magic doubles, but the
damage dealt while the ability is in effect is
1.25 times greater no matter which sword magic
is used.

The damage from the currently equipped
weapon is added to the damage of magic
attacks.

Displays the number of unopened treasure
chests within a dungeon on the map screen.

Avoid damage and status ailments from tricks,
traps, and other dungeon devices. Note that this
effect applies to all allies.
Raise maximum MP by 10%.

Earn 1.2 times the normal amount of job
points. Note that this effect does not stack with
similar effects from items.

Has a 75% chance to survive with 1 HP
when suffering damage that would result in KO.
Note that this will not happen if HP is already
at 1.
Confer immunity to poison during battles.

Lure enemies into battle with <sprite name="button_ZR">. Cannot be
used in areas without enemy encounters.

Maximum HP, maximum MP, physical attack,
magic attack, physical defense, and magic
defense each rise 1% with every job mastered.

Double a weapon’s physical attack when
swords/axes/spears/staves/katanas are held
with both hands. (One hand must be free
before this will take effect.)
Raise physical defense by 10%.

Raise physical defense by 25% for five turns
each time Protect Ally, Full Cover, or
White Knight is used.

*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.
Raise armor aptitude for shields to S.
Raise arms aptitude for swords to S.
Equip a shield on both arms.
Raise physical defense by 30%.

Black magic damage rises with each ally
(excluding yourself) on which Black
Resonance has been set.
0 allies with Black Resonance: No effect
1 ally with Black Resonance: Damage ×1.1
2 allies with Black Resonance: Damage ×1.15
3 allies with Black Resonance: Damage ×1.2
Raise arms aptitude for rods to S.

Disperse 15% of damage to each ally when hit
by a single-target attack and sustain the
remaining damage yourself. Does not apply
to magic damage reflected by Reflect.

Reduce damage taken from fire attacks.
Note that you will not receive further reduction
if this ability is used along with items with
similar effects. Fire nullification effects take
precedence over reduction effects.
Confer immunity to silence during battles.
Raise magic attack by 20%.

Ignore the target’s magic defense when dealing
magic damage.

Enable group-casting even for normally
non-group-cast magic. However, this does
not apply to magic targeting yourself.
Raise magic defense by 10%.
Raise arms aptitude for staves to S.

Recover from poison, blind, and silence at
the end of a battle.

Reduce damage taken from water attacks.
Note that you will not receive further reduction
if this ability is used along with items with
similar effects. Water nullification effects
take precedence over reduction effects.

Has a 50% chance to halve the damage
received, regardless of whether it is a
single-target or multiple-target attack. However,
this effect does not apply to damage from
poison.
Raise magic defense by 30%.

The damage dealt and the amount of recovery
do not decline when group-casting magic. Note
that this effect can also be invoked from the
Menu Screen.

Bring back all allies from KO and restore all
their HP when you suffer a KO. Note that if
multiple characters have this support ability
the effect occurs once per battle for each of
them, and it will occur even if everyone
suffers a KO at the same time.

Restores up to 9,999 HP in the absence of a
limit-breaking effect.
Raise maximum HP by 10%.

Raise arms aptitude for knuckles to S. In
addition, when no weapons are equipped, a
value equal to two times your level will be added
to your physical attack.
Confer immunity to blind during battles.
Raise physical attack by 10%.
Raise maximum HP by 20%.
Raise maximum HP by 30%.

Raise physical attack by 100% when nothing is
equipped in the right hand, left hand, head,
body, and accessory slots.
Confer immunity to paralysis during battles.
Raise arms aptitude for bows to S.
Raise accuracy by 100%.

When all conventional attacks hit, damage
will rise according to the number of attacks.
Specifically, damage is increased by 3% for
each attack.

Evade an attack and counterattack, dealing the
same damage as a conventional attack.
Raise evasion by 10%.

Magic attack and physical attack each rise 25%
for three turns with each physical attack evaded.

*The upper limit for physical attack
and magic attack is 150%.

Has a chance to perform an additional attack
after defeating a target with a conventional
attack. Note that the chance goes up the more
damage you deal in relation to the defeated
target’s remaining HP.
Raise evasion by 20%.
Raise evasion by 30%.

The limit on the number of attacks rises from
sixteen to thirty-two.

Reduce damage taken from earth attacks.
Note that you will not receive further reduction
if this ability is used along with items with
similar effects. Earth nullification effects take
precedence over reduction effects.
Raise arms aptitude for katanas to S.

Has a 25% chance to follow up with an additional
attack when making a conventional attack.
Confer immunity to confusion during battles.

Raise the damage dealt by counterattacks to
1.5 times normal. This is effective even for
counterattacks other than the swordmaster’s.

The higher your BP, the more the power of
your physical attacks rises.
0 BP or less: no effect
1 BP: ×1.1
2 BP: ×1.21
3 BP: ×1.33
4 BP: ×1.46

Raise speed to maximum for two turns when
using Default.

*The upper limit for speed is 150%.

Physical attack and physical defense each rise
by 50% for five turns when your HP falls below
20%.

*The upper limit for physical attack
and physical defense is 150%.
Raise physical attack by 20%.
Raise arms aptitude for axes to S.

Reduce damage taken from dark attacks.
Note that you will not receive further reduction
if this ability is used along with items with
similar effects. Dark nullification effects take
precedence over reduction effects.

Your physical attack, magic attack, physical
defense, and magic defense each rise by 10%
for three turns each time you take damage
greater than 25% of your maximum HP.

*The upper limit for physical attack, magic attack,
physical defense, and magic defense is 150%.

Deal four times the damage of a conventional
attack to all enemies when you suffer a KO.
Note that this will not activate while reraise is
in effect.
Raise armor aptitude for helms to S.
Raise physical attack by 30%.

The damage dealt by dark attacks rises 1.25
times, regardless of whether it is from a weapon,
magic, or an ability.

Reduce damage taken from light-elemental attacks.
Note that you will not receive further reduction
if this ability is used along with items with
similar effects. Light nullification effects take
precedence over reduction effects.
Raise physical defense by 20%.

Has a 15% chance of a critical hit when using
magic. A critical hit will double the amount of
damage or recovery.

Reduce the amount of damage received during
Default by 75%.

Has a 15% chance of a critical hit when using
an item. A critical hit will double the amount of
damage or recovery.

The damage dealt from critical hits will be
2.5 times normal. Note that this effect applies
to magic and item critical hits as well.

Raise the BP limit by one, up to a maximum
of 4.
Raise aptitude for armor to S.

Physical attack, magic attack, physical defense,
and magic defense rise by 25% for 5 turns each
time you defeat an enemy with your own attack.

*The upper limit for physical attack, magic attack,
physical defense, and magic defense is 150%.

Raise the damage dealt by genome abilities to
1.25 times normal.
Fully restore your HP at the end of a battle.

Raise the damage dealt by drain attacks to 1.5
times normal. (The BP drained by Battle Thirst
will be doubled.)

A character with this ability can learn certain
enemy abilities when targeted by them.

You have a 50% chance to recover from KO
at the end of the turn. Your HP will also recover
an amount equal to 25% of your maximum HP.

Raise the MP cost of black magic by 1.5 times,
and raise its damage by 1.25 times. This can be
set at the same time as Max Black Magic.

Recover HP equal to 25% of the damage
taken from a magic attack. This effect is
not triggered by damage from poison,
nor by damage that results in a KO.
Lower the MP cost of black magic by 25%.

Raise the damage of magic attacks to 1.5 times
normal when the last digit of your current MP
is 0.

Increase the damage of magic that can only be
group-cast to 1.5 times normal by narrowing its
focus to a single target.
Raise the chances of imparting a status ailment.

The MP cost of black magic doubles, but it also
does 1.5 times more damage. This can be set at
the same time as Black Magic Amp.

Reduce damage taken from lightning attacks.
Note that you will not receive further reduction
if this ability is used along with items with
similar effects. Lightning nullification effects
take precedence over reduction effects.

The amount that affinity goes up with one
Summon Friend doubles.

Raise the MP cost of summon magic by 1.25
times, and raise its damage by 1.25 times. This
can be set at the same time as Max
Summoning.

When you suffer a KO, random summon
magic that you have learned is invoked without
consuming any MP. Note that this effect will not
occur during reraise or in the case of a KO
from poison damage.

Each time summon magic is used in combat,
the damage it does rises by 10%. Note that
the same summon magic does not have to be
used for this to take effect.

When your HP falls below 20%, summon magic
that you have learned is randomly invoked
without consuming any MP. Note that this effect
is not triggered by poison damage.

Boost the damage, recovery amount, chance of
imparting a status ailment, and number of turns
amping/weakening lasts when using Summon
Friend.
Recover 30 MP at the end of each turn.

Recover 200 MP when your HP falls below
20%.
Lower the MP cost of summon magic by 25%.

Recover 25% of your maximum MP at the
end of a battle.

Cause instant death at the start of battle
to targets twenty or more levels lower than
you. Note that you will still get the usual pg,
experience, JP, and items at the end of the
battle. This will not work on certain enemies
such as bosses.

The MP cost of summon magic doubles, but it
also does 1.5 times more damage. This can be
set at the same time as Summoning Amp.
Raise maximum MP by 30%.

Earn 1.5 times more experience than normal.
Note that this effect does not stack with similar
effects from items.
Raise arms aptitude for spears to S.

The BP cost of abilities activated by BP use
rises by one, but the damage they deal also
increases by 1.5 times.

Your attacks’ damage will not be reduced by
the target’s Default state.

Physical attack and magic attack each rise by
25% for five turns each time an ally suffers a
KO.

*The upper limit for physical attack
and magic attack is 150%.

The number of turns in the air during jump-type
abilities increases by one turn, and the amount
of damage dealt rises by 1.5 times. Note that
the BP cost also rises by one, except for with
Sky High.

Begin the battle in the air and come diving down
to attack on the first turn, dealing double the
damage of a conventional attack to one enemy.
Note that damage is tripled if a spear is
equipped.

Invoke Shell on yourself for ten turns at start of
battle.
Raise magic defense by 20%.
Lower the MP cost of white magic by 25%.

Lower physical attack by 25%, but boost the
effectiveness of recovery magic by 2.5 times.
Maximum HP doubles only during battle.

Double the effectiveness of recovery effects
when you use magic, abilities, or items to
restore HP or MP.

Raise the damage dealt by attack items to 1.5
times normal.

The chance of the status ailments sleep,
paralyze, dread, confuse, charm, and stop
being naturally cured at the start of each turn
rises to 50% higher than normal.

Automatically use a potion on yourself when
you take damage. Note that you must have a
potion for this to occur.

Automatically use phoenix down if an ally
is currently KO’d during the last command
in your turn. Note that this will not occur if you
do not have any phoenix down.

HP will not fall for two turns after the start of a
battle, even when taking damage. But at the end
of the second turn, any damage taken will be
subtracted from HP all at once. Note that
damage in this case cannot be reduced.
Raise maximum MP by 20%.

Raise BP by one when evading an enemy
attack.

When your HP falls below 20%, the chance of
scoring a critical hit will rise by 900% for five
turns.

BP rises by one when your attack defeats an
enemy. Note that if you simultaneously defeat
multiple enemies, your BP rises by the number
of enemies defeated.

Lower the MP cost of black, white, time, and
summon magic by 25%.

Raise BP by two when sustaining a status
ailment.

Has a 25% chance to increase BP by one when
taking damage. Poison damage does not trigger
this ability.

Has a 75% chance to raise your BP by two when
your HP falls below 20%. Using abilities that
consume your own HP does not trigger this
ability, however.

MP cost falls to zero when your HP is below
20%.

Raise magic attack damage when you have
negative BP.
0 BP or more: No effect
–1 BP: ×1.2 damage
–2 BP: ×1.3 damage
–3 BP: ×1.4 damage
–4 BP: ×1.5 damage

Reduce damage taken from wind attacks.
Note that you will not receive further reduction
if this ability is used along with items with
similar effects. Wind nullification effects take
precedence over reduction effects.
Raise speed by 10%.
Raise speed by 20%.

Raise all allies’ BP by one when the party gets
first strike or gains a +1 BP bonus at the start
of battle.
Raise arms aptitude for daggers to S.

Double the success rate of stealing abilities.
Note that this effect does not stack with similar
effects from items.
Nab two items instead of one when stealing.
Raise speed by 30%.

Raise physical attack by 25% when stealing an
item from an enemy or recovering HP with Life
Thief.

*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.

Has a 50% chance to deal double damage and
a 50% chance to deal none.

The ally with the most HP protects you when
you suffer a single-target physical attack while
your HP is below 20%.

Earn 1.5 times more money than normal after
a battle. Note that this effect does not stack with
similar effects from items, but the bonus from
multiple characters using this ability does stack.

Add 10% to the stat-raising effects you receive,
and subtract 10% from stat-lowering effects.

Your physical attack, magic attack, physical
defense, and magic defense each rise 5% for
five turns at the end of each turn.

*The upper limit for physical attack, magic attack,
physical defense, and magic defense is 150%.

Double the number of turns that stat-raising
effects on yourself last.
Confer immunity to charm during battles.
Lower the MP cost of Singing by 50%.
